headline: 111-year-old grocery chain closing more stores in 2026
summary: A century-old grocery store chain is continuing a wave of store closures into 2026, signaling a major change in the U.S. retail landscape. For many consumers, the loss of a nearby, affordable grocery store is more than an inconvenience; it can disrupt access to essentials, increase transportation ...
